methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.get_collection
documentation:
Get the correct BO database collection from the bo_classes collection.

```
param db_torii

Torii database object

param db_bo

Customer database object

param collection_name

BO Class name

return

Mongo collection from db_bo param
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.find_one
documentation:
Find one document in collection.

```
param collection

Collection context.

param query

Query filter.

param include

List of keys to project in final result (removes all other keys from result).

return

The document if found, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.find_many
documentation:
Find one or more documents in collection.

```
param collection

Collection context.

param query

Query filter.

param filters

Optional personalised filters.

param include

List of keys to project in final result (removes all other keys from result).

param direction

Orders the result as Ascending ('ASC') or Descending (any other value).
Only applied if 'sort' is not None. Default 'ASC'.

param sort

Key to sort the result. Applies 'direction'.

param timeout

Time limit (in seconds) for the query operation to return a result.

param limit

Limit the number of documents returned by the query.

param start

The number of results to skip, therefore starting at a later part of the result.

return

List of dictionary documents.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.count_documents
documentation:
Count the number of documents returned by query.

```
param collection

Collection context.

param filters

Optional personalised filters.

param start

The number of results to skip, therefore starting at a later part of the result.

param limit

Limit the number of documents returned by the query.

return

Total number of documents found by query.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.prepare_query
documentation:
Helper method.

Guarantees the ID in the query/document is a MongoDB ObjectId.

```
param query

Query filter or JSON like document.

return

The modified query/document.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.prepare_filter
documentation:
Helper method.

Turns the optional, personalised filters into a query compatible dictionary.

```
param filters

Optional personalised filters.

return

A query compatible dictionary.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.prepare_update
documentation:
Helper method.

Removes any key in the given document that is prohibited from being updated by any User.
Also adds/updates the 'modificationDate' value to reflect the new update.

```
param document

JSON like document.

return

The modified document.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.prepare_result
documentation:
Helper method.

Prepares a MongoDB output result to be JSON compatible.

```
param document

JSON like document.

return

The modified document.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.ensure_string_keys
documentation:
Helper method.

Optimized way to ensure all keys in JSON like document are strings.

```
param document

JSON like document

return

The modified document with all keys as string.
```

methods.name: torii.dao.abstract_dao.AbstractDao.to_torii_object
documentation:
Helper method.

Prepares a document by converting all keys to String
and adding all default elements expected from a ToriiObject.

```
param document

JSON like document.

return

The modified document with all default elements expected from a ToriiObject.
```

This class offers the base MongoDB data access functionality.

Any custom query function should use the helper methods to guarantee functionality.

functions.name: torii.data.struct.cast_value
documentation:
Try to cast to float, integer, dict, bool if possible
ast.literal_eval(node_or_string)
Safely evaluate an expression node or a string containing a Python
expression. The string or node provided may only consist of the following
Python literal structures: strings, numbers, tuples, lists, dicts, booleans,
and None.

```
param value

the value to cast

return

```

methods.name: torii.torii_main.Torii.__init__
documentation:
---
param password: password (optional)
param properties_file: path to the property file to use
param username: username (optional)
---

\:param session_id initiate the client with an existing session
\:param login: autologin

> (True=force the logging, False=no logging, None=try to reuse the existing session or log in)

```
param timeout

autologin timeout

param container

use container ('new', 'current' or None)

param name

name of the session

param log_level

'CRITICAL', 'ERROR', 'WARNING', 'INFO', 'DEBUG'

param save_properties

save the connection settings in the properties file
(True=force the writing, False=no writing, None=only the session)

param http_cookies

Cookies dict to be appended to HTTP Session

param http_timeout

Default timeout for all HTTP Session requests

param http_max_retries

Maximum number of retries for the HTTP Session requests

param db_prefix

Customer database name to filter for in bo_bases

param kwargs

extra connection properties (see __DEFAULT_PROPERTIES)
```

classes.name: torii.managers.dao_manager.DaoManager

methods.name: torii.managers.dao_manager.DaoManager.run_service
documentation:
Runs the intended service corresponding to the given intent and path.
Passes the defined arguments to the service.

```
param intent

The Http method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE or PATCH).

param path

The REST API path (ex.: bo/{boClass}/page).

param params

Optional keyword argument.

param json

Optional argument.

param data

Optional argument.

param files

Optional argument.

param timeout

Optional argument.

returns

The class method if exists, otherwise None.
```

The manager for all data access objects (DAOs).

All DAOs should be mapped to the 'services_ref' dictionary, where the Key is the
first element in the REST API path and the value the uninitialized DAO class.

methods.name: torii.managers.user_manager.UserManager.check_user_permission
documentation:
Checks User permissions for the collection in context.

Checks if class is readable/writeable and if User is in the same team as the said class,
from Torii.bo_classes collection.

```
param bo_class_name

the nameofthe BO class to check.

param read

Set True if User is reading any document, otherwise False.

param write

Set True if User is writing, updating or deleting any document, otherwise False.

return

A bool to identify if User has permission, and a str explaining the reason.
```

methods.name: torii.managers.user_manager.UserManager.check_team_access
documentation:
Helper method.

Check if User is in the same team as the document in question.

```
param document

JSON-like object representing the document.

return

The given document if teams match, otherwise None.
```

methods.name: torii.managers.user_manager.UserManager.remove_no_access_documents
documentation:
Helper method.

Removes all documents in the list that the User has no access to.

```
param documents

List of JSON-like objects that represent documents.

return

The filtered list.
```

methods.name: torii.managers.user_manager.UserManager.update_user
documentation:

Get the User by ID from the current Torii session.

```
return

```

methods.name: torii.services.torii_service.ToriiService.list
documentation:
List objects from the service
\:param dir: the sorting direction
\:param sort: the sorting property
\:param timeout: the request timeout in seconds
\:param limit: the maximum number of objects to be listed
\:param start: the index of the first object to be listed (regarding the sorting and filters)
\:param filters: the filters to apply
\:param strict_filter: filter the strings with 'eq' instead of 'like'
\:param include: the fields to include when getting the objects
\:param no_paging: use raw listing (no paging, no filtering)
\:param count: return the total count of elements along with the page
\:param raw: don't cast the objects in Java
\:param kwargs: quick filters

```
return

a list of objects
```

return

Delete an object
\:param obj: the object to refresh
\:param force: force the delete
\:return:

classes.name: torii.decorators.route_registry.RouteRegistry

methods.name: torii.decorators.route_registry.RouteRegistry.register
documentation:
Register a class method to a specific route.

```pycon
>>> @registry.register('GET', '{var}/path')
>>> def my_class_method(self, var):
>>>     print(var)
```

```
param method

The Http method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH or DELETE).

param route

The unique route to associate with the class method. Supports multiple dynamic path variables.

returns

Calls the respective method and returns its result.
```

methods.name: torii.decorators.route_registry.RouteRegistry.call_method
documentation:
Runs the wrapped function that corresponds to the given path.

```
param instance

Reference to the class instance

param http_method

The Http method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH or DELETE)

param path

The requested path

param args

Any additional arguments to be passed to the function

param kwargs

Any additional keyword arguments to be passed to the function

returns

The wrapped function if path matches.

raises ValueError

If no match was found for given path.
```

methods.name: torii.decorators.route_registry.RouteRegistry._load_json
documentation:
Convert JSON compatible strings back to the original object.

```
param kwargs

Dictionary with all keyword arguments.

return

Dictionary with the correct objects loaded.
```

methods.name: torii.decorators.route_registry.RouteRegistry.match_specific_route
documentation:
Match with specific route (i.e., \{var}/path).

```
param routes

Dictionary with all the routes of a given Http method

param path_parts

The list of path parts to compare with the registry path parts

return

The wrapped function if paths match, otherwise None
```

methods.name: torii.decorators.route_registry.RouteRegistry.match_any_route
documentation:
Get the first route that matches (i.e., \{var1}/\{var2}).

```
param routes

Dictionary with all the routes of a given Http method

param path_parts

The list of path parts to compare with the registry path parts

return

The wrapped function if paths match, otherwise None
```

A client-side imitation of a Web Framework view path registry.

This class serves to create backwards compatibility and fallback capable code
between established REST API calls and client-side data access objects (DAOs).

methods.name: torii.services.task_service.TaskService.check_status
documentation:
Check if a task or the children or the descendants are active

by default, if no argument is provided the service will check the children of the current container

```

the task to check (id or Task)

param parent

the parent of the tasks to check (id or Task)

param root

the root of the tasks to check (id or Task)

param status

the status against which the task(s) is checked

return

True or False
```
